conditions: Right-edge 4 ft piling is sharp with clear texture. Mid/right-background piling and further pilings are visible only as broad hazy columns without bottom detail. No clear view of 30 ft pilings or bottom. This matches the guideline for a hazy/faded 14 ft piling silhouette.

Right 4ft piling is sharp with clear texture. Mid/background pilings around 14–30ft are present only as hazy silhouettes without visible detail, similar to or slightly better than the 25ft reference but without bottom visible. This corresponds best to the 25ft category.

Only the nearest piling on the right edge is clearly visible with good texture; no mid or far pilings are discernible, and the background fades into uniform water column. This corresponds to visibility limited to the closest structure.

Closest 4 ft piling at right edge is sharp with clear texture. The 11 ft piling is visible but somewhat soft, and farther 14–30 ft pilings are not distinctly separated or textured, more merged into background haze. This matches conditions where only the nearest piling is clearly defined beyond short range.
